title: the ultimate Squidward pack
description: turns everything related to villagers into Squidward
body:
(requires optifine) 
Squidward has had enough of SpongeBob so he decided to create his own civilasation in the world of minecraft. Explore the villages full of Squidwards, help them defend themselves from the Squilliams and lock the baby ones deep down in your basement so you can exploid them economecly ones they're adult over and over again.... uhhmmm i-i mean TRADE WITH THEM! YES OFCOURSE! Trade your precious emeralds with Squidward to get better stuff :)

What does this resource pack change?

-     villagers to Squidward Tentacles (custom job/biome textures)
-     zombie villagers to zombie Squidward (same job and biome textures as villager)
-     pillager to Squilliam Richerson
-     vindicator to Squilliam (oh ne he's hot meme version)
-     evoker to Squilliam in an orchestral suit
-     evoker fangs to clarinets
-     ravager to Squidasaurus rex (from the second SpongeBob movie)
-     wandering trader to Squidward with the wandering trader clothes
-     witch to captain magma (the superhero version of Squidward)
-     totem of undying to Squidward totem
-     humble painting has now two Squidwards in the painting instead of two villagers
-     iron golem to handsome squidward (will look more beaten up the more you hit him)
-     villager trading gui

Also you can rename a Villager to "Miku" to get... drum rolls please... MIKU SQUIDWARD
